title: Viacha Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Viacha, with a Z-Score of -4.23. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Viacha are extremely cold, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 15.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 75%, and the wind speed is relatively low at 2.4 km/h. 
 There are no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded, indicating the severity of the cold snap.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the impact of the cold snap on the city
